name: Lemon Zucchini Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together brown sugar, oil, eggs, lemon peel, and lemon juice until well combined.
2. Add flour, baking soda, salt, zucchini, and nuts; stir just until combined. Spread evenly in an ungreased 10 x 6 inch micro-safe baking dish.
3. Microwave on medium-high (70%), uncovered for 7 minutes, rotating the dish once. Then, microwave on high for 2 1/2 to 3 1/2 minutes, rotating once, until no longer dough.
4. Combine powdered sugar and butter or margarine in a micro-safe bowl. Microwave on high, uncovered, for 15-20 seconds, or until the butter is softened.
5. Blend in lemon juice and enough water to achieve a spreading consistency.
6. Spread over bars. Cut into squares.
